name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentations that actually look like you made them, not a robot.
problem: Generic AI presentation tools produce cookie-cutter slides that undermine credibility and brand identity. Chronicle 2.0 gives teams a way to build polished, visually distinct presentations with AI support that enhances rather than homogenises the output. This saves time without sacrificing the quality and authenticity that stakeholders expect.
useCases: Creating investor decks that stand out from templated AI-generated pitches
Building client-facing proposals with consistent brand identity
Producing internal strategy presentations quickly without design resources
Turning written reports or documents into structured slide narratives
